3185100.name: Oldish Stuff
3185100.description:
Loot, Sell, Survive - Profit from Chaos.

Oldish Stuff is a 2D action looter set in a decadent world. Interdimensional portals open in this world, bringing enemies, loot and absurdity. As a thrift shop owner without morals or compassion, you raid chaotic dimensions, looting the dead and selling your finds to anyone still breathing.

Your shop is not just a selling point, it is the centre of progress. Valuable loot from portal runs, rare enemy parts and equipment upgrades contribute directly to expanding and automating your business.

Battles are fast and varied. You'll fight with melee combos, special abilities, stuns, and status effects. The enemies you face are grotesque, ranging from cultists to mutants, and the loot they drop changes the gameplay.

In between battles, you price items, deal with customer behaviour and manipulate the economy. Who buys what matters. The inventory in your shop affects the enemies you face in the future, and some may return for revenge.

Key Features:

Loot-Driven Gameplay Loop: Dive into chaotic dimensions, defeat twisted enemies, and scavenge their remains for profit.

Dynamic Combat System: Engage in fast-paced melee combat, utilize special abilities, and exploit status effects to overcome grotesque foes.

Trade Progression: Sell your loot to expand your shop, unlock dark abilities, and automate your operations for maximum efficiency.

Enemy-Interactive Economy: The gear you sell doesn't just disappear, it equips future enemies, making each decision impactful.

Stylized 2D Visuals: Immerse yourself in a darkly humorous world brought to life with hand drawn enemy designs and environments.

High Replayability: Experience randomized loot, diverse enemy types, and scalable challenges that keep each playthrough fresh.

No moral choices, no heroes. Just pure unethical profit.
3185100.supported_languages:
英语*, 土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
